overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, showing the player character walking through an industrial facility from a concrete security corridor through a high-tech control room and into darker warehouse maintenance areas.

events.description: approaching and opening metal security door with red indicator light

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow concrete corridor toward a security door

entered.detail: rough gray concrete block walls with visible seams and texture
heavy dark metal door with small rectangular window and red warning light above
long rectangular fluorescent fixture casting harsh white light
dark metal cabinet or trash bin with yellow markings

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow concrete security corridor illuminated by overhead fluorescent lighting. The rough gray walls frame a heavy metal security door ahead marked with a red indicator light, while a metal cabinet sits to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: server control room with holographic displays

events.description: entering high-tech control room with cyan-lit server consoles and holographic displays
passing by NPC in white outfit standing near server racks

agents.ego_description: walking through control room examining server consoles and glowing interface panels

notable_agents.action: person in white lab coat standing still near server consoles, facing the equipment

entered.detail: tall black server racks with glowing cyan interface panels and blinking lights
floating holographic screens emitting bright cyan light showing data readouts
network of industrial pipes and conduits running along the ceiling
large flatscreen display mounted on the left wall showing technical graphics

segments.scene_description: The player enters a high-tech control room filled with server racks emitting cyan light. Exposed industrial piping runs overhead while holographic displays float in the center of the room. A person in a white lab coat stands near the consoles on the right as the player moves deeper into the facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with large pipes

events.description: moving into darker industrial area with dim amber lighting and large orange pipes

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow industrial corridor with exposed piping and metal flooring

metal grid flooring with red emergency lighting visible underneath
corrugated metal roll-up door with horizontal slats

segments.scene_description: The player transitions into a darker industrial maintenance corridor dominated by large orange-insulated pipes running along the left wall. The metal grating floor reveals red lighting beneath, and the ambient illumination shifts to dimmer, warmer tones as the player progresses toward a metal shutter door.

scene_state.functional_zone: warehouse storage area with stacked cargo

events.description: approaching and stopping near armed guard in tactical gear

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing an armed guard standing near stacked crates in the warehouse

notable_agents.action: armed guard in black tactical outfit with illuminated helmet visor standing alert near cargo crates

entered.detail: wooden and metal cargo crates stacked in piles throughout the warehouse floor
distant warm yellow light sources illuminating the far end of the warehouse

segments.scene_description: The player enters a wide warehouse storage area filled with stacked cargo crates and concrete support pillars. The lighting is dim with warm yellow sources in the distance. An armed guard in black tactical gear with a glowing helmet stands near the crates on the right as the player approaches and stops.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sterile security corridor into a high-tech hub and finally into the dim depths of an industrial warehouse. It begins by moving through a narrow concrete hallway under fluorescent lights toward a heavy metal security door. As the player passes through the door, the environment opens into a high-tech control room where cyan-lit server racks and floating holographic displays replace the gray walls, with a figure in a white lab coat standing by the consoles. The scene then shifts into a darker maintenance corridor characterized by large orange-insulated pipes and red under-floor lighting, before finally expanding into a wide warehouse storage area. The journey concludes among stacked cargo crates and concrete pillars, where the lighting turns a dim yellow and an armed guard in tactical gear stands watch.
